disposition_rationale: This directly addresses the risk that the idea ledger becomes archival rather than behavior-shaping.
next_step: Define a signal taxonomy and decide which existing artifacts should feed it first: session trace, reflections, and synthesis outputs.
summary: Build a mechanism that classifies ongoing interactions into noise, local friction, and compoundable value so the supervisor can keep the active queue small while still surfacing high-leverage recurring patterns.
title: Interaction-derived signal triage for compoundable value
